LanguageData.EI_HandQuern.label: hand quern
LanguageData.EI_HandQuern.description: A compact, unpowered quern for milling oats into a prepared cooking ingredient.
LanguageData.EI_MilledOats.label: milled oats
LanguageData.EI_MilledOats.description: Ground oats prepared for cooking. They are an ingredient, not a finished meal.
LanguageData.EI_OatPorridge.label: oat porridge
LanguageData.EI_OatPorridge.description: A fresh cooked oat food. It is quick to finish once oats have already been milled, but it does not keep for long.
LanguageData.EI_OatFlatbread.label: oat flatbread
LanguageData.EI_OatFlatbread.description: A plain cooked oat flatbread. It takes substantial work to make, but keeps longer than fresh meals.
